name: Competitive Landscape Mapping
description: Systematically map the competitive structure of a market using Porter's Five Forces and strategic group analysis.

name: Quantitative Reasoning
description: Apply numeracy and statistical thinking to evaluate claims, size markets, and build back-of-envelope models.

name: Synthesis and Recommendation
description: Distill research across multiple sources into a clear, defensible recommendation with explicit reasoning.

name: Trend Signal Detection
description: Identify and distinguish genuine structural trends from noise and cyclical fluctuations in market and technology data.

name: Scenario Analysis Modeling
description: Build structured base/bull/bear scenario models that quantify a range of outcomes rather than committing to a single point forecast.

name: Intrinsic Valuation (DCF)
description: Estimate fundamental value from future cash flows using DCF, cross-checked with relative multiples, triangulated to a range.

name: Macro Regime Mapping
description: Situate any investment thesis within the current macroeconomic regime to understand which assets and sectors are structurally favored.

name: Earnings Quality Forensics
description: Assess whether reported earnings reflect economic reality or accounting choices using accrual decomposition and Beneish M-Score screening.

name: Risk Surface Stress Testing
description: Systematically stress a thesis or portfolio against tail scenarios to identify hidden concentrations and underpriced risks.
